hooks.command: echo '--- Session Context ---' && if [ -f CLAUDE.md ]; then CMD_SIZE=$(stat -f%z CLAUDE.md 2>/dev/null || stat -c%s CLAUDE.md 2>/dev/null || echo 0); echo "CLAUDE.md: ${CMD_SIZE} bytes"; fi && if [ -d .memory-bank ]; then MB_COUNT=$(find .memory-bank -name '*.md' -type f 2>/dev/null | head -50 | wc -l | tr -d ' '); echo "Memory Bank: ${MB_COUNT} .md files"; if [ "$MB_COUNT" -gt 0 ] 2>/dev/null; then find .memory-bank -name '*.md' -type f 2>/dev/null | head -20 | while read f; do echo "  - $(basename $f)"; done; echo 'REQUIRED: Read ALL Memory Bank files (memory_bank_read) BEFORE any action. Restore full project context.'; else echo 'Memory Bank empty. Save context using memory_bank_write when tasks are completed.'; fi; else echo 'Memory Bank: not configured'; fi && echo "Project: $(basename $(pwd))" && if git rev-parse --git-dir > /dev/null 2>&1; then echo "Branch: $(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null)" && echo "Modified: $(git status --short 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' ') files" && echo "Last commit: $(git log --oneline -1 2>/dev/null)"; fi && echo '---'

echo '=== COMPACTED CONTEXT === REQUIRED ACTIONS BEFORE CONTINUING:' && echo '1. Read project CLAUDE.md to recover mandatory rules and skills' && echo '2. Read ALL .md files in .memory-bank/ using memory_bank_read' && echo '3. Restore full context: in-progress tasks, decisions, modified files' && echo '4. Check applicable skills (brainstorming, debugging, TDD, writing-plans, verification)' && echo '5. ONLY THEN continue working where you left off' && echo 'REMINDER: Skills are MANDATORY even after compact. Check the skills table in CLAUDE.md.' && if [ -d .memory-bank ]; then echo '--- Memory Bank files:'; find .memory-bank -name '*.md' -type f 2>/dev/null | head -20 | while read f; do echo "  - $(basename $f)"; done; fi && echo "Project: $(basename $(pwd))" && if git rev-parse --git-dir > /dev/null 2>&1; then echo "Branch: $(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null)" && echo "Last commit: $(git log --oneline -1 2>/dev/null)" && echo 'Modified files:'; git diff --name-only 2>/dev/null | head -10; fi && echo '=== END COMPACTED CONTEXT ==='

CMD=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty') && if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '^rm -rf [/~]|sudo rm|chmod 777|git push .* (-f|--force)|git push (-f|--force)'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Dangerous command blocked. Use safer alternatives."}}'; fi
echo 'If task completed: update Memory Bank + tasks'
